name: trouble-shoot-with-doc
description: Troubleshoot system issues and capture a detailed timeline and root cause in a blameless incident record. Trigger this skill during or after debugging incidents, tracking post-mortems, or investigating production failures.
custom_notes: Ask a clarifying question any time symptoms, scope, environment, timeline, conclusion, or user approval to record an incident is ambiguous. Prefer the native `request_user_input` tool when available and when the answer can be represented as discrete choices; fall back to a direct conversational question when the tool is unavailable, not exposed in the current mode, or the answer is open-ended. Keep questions focused and ask one decision at a time.
